---
title: "connect-actions e2e test report"
format: html
jupyter: python3
---

## Overview

A minimal Quarto document with Python content, used to exercise the `deploy`
action's Quarto path in the end-to-end tests.

```{python}
import sys

print(f"Rendered with Python {sys.version.split()[0]}")
```

```{python}
values = [n**2 for n in range(1, 6)]
print(f"Squares: {values}")
print(f"Sum: {sum(values)}")
```
